nasb.text: Shall I then take my bread and my water and my meat that I have slaughtered for my shearers, and give it to men whose origin I do not know?”

esv.text: Shall I take my bread and my water and my meat that I have killed for my shearers and give it to men who come from I do not know where?”

cnv.text: 我怎能把我的餅、我的水，和我為剪羊毛的人宰殺的肉，給那些我不知道從哪裡來的人呢？”

ccb.text: 我怎能把饼、水和为剪羊毛者预备的肉分给一群来历不明的人呢？”
